Parse each operation string to extract the operation type and target column. Use string splitting on ':'.
For normalization, compute min and max of the column, then apply (x - min) / (max - min). Handle the edge case where max equals min.
For one-hot encoding, find all unique values, sort them alphabetically, then create a binary column for each unique value.
Build the final feature matrix by combining all transformed columns. Keep track of column names as you process operations.
